title: Advanced Vanilla Logistics
body:
# Advanced Vanilla Logistics
Tired of picking up trash blocks that you accidentally mined with your maxed out pickaxe. 
With this mod you can enable configurable tweaks to help with inventory management in the late-game.

### Features
- Configurable break block blacklist
- Configurable item pickup blacklist
- Configuration via Cloth-Config (currently only via ModMenu)
